title: Anime Training
description: Let's start anime production training with Garu-chan!

scenes.speech: Welcome to Garu-chan's dojo! Let's start anime training together!
scenes.title: Welcome to Anime Dojo!
scenes.content: Let's acquire the skills to create anime. Here, we'll learn step by step from character creation to storytelling!

scenes.speech: First, let's think about the 'character'! What kind of child will it be?
scenes.title: Character Training
scenes.content: Let's decide on the main character of the anime. Think of three things: name, personality, and likes!
scenes.highlight:
Example:
Name → Garu-chan
Personality → Energetic and curious
Likes → Bamboo and surprise adventures

scenes.speech: The story is important, Garu! Let's think of three parts: beginning, middle, and end!
scenes.title: Story Training
scenes.content: Anime has three parts: 'beginning', 'incident', and 'resolution'. Let's create one scene, it's okay if it's simple!
scenes.highlight:
Example:
Beginning → The main character meets a monster
Incident → The friend is kidnapped!
Resolution → Working together to rescue!

scenes.speech: Let's create a storyboard using AI tools!
scenes.title: Storyboard Practice
scenes.content: Ask NotebookLM or AI to 'create a storyboard for this scene'. What scene comes to mind?
scenes.highlight:
Tools to use:
・NotebookLM
・Canva
・AI Image Generator

scenes.speech: Voice and music are also important, Garu! Let's create music with Suno
scenes.title: Music and Voice Training
scenes.content: Music is essential for anime! Let's create a theme song with AI or think about the character's voice.
scenes.highlight:
Challenge:
Create an 'upbeat anime theme song' with Suno AI
Example: 'Courage, move forward!'

scenes.speech: Great job on the training, Garu! Let's create and present works
scenes.title: Training Completed!
scenes.content: You've mastered the basics of anime production! Next, let's actually create a work and present it on Slack!
